name: Miglior Cat Food Salmon Alutray - 100g
description: COMPOSITION: Meat and animal derivatives 50%, fish and fish derivatives (salmon 5%), minerals. ANALYTICAL CONSTITUENTS: Moisture 80%, Crude protein 11%, Crude fibres 0.5%, Crude fat 4%, Crude ash 1.8%. Nutritional additives / kg: Vitamin E 23.7 mg, Zinc (Zinc sulphate monohydrate) 2.1 mg, Copper (Copper sulphate pentahydrate) 2.0 mg, Manganese (Manganous sulphate monohydrate) 2.1 mg, Iodine (Potassium iodide) 0.4 mg. HOW TO USE: The product is ready to use. STORAGE INSTRUCTION: Store the product in a cool and dry place.
